goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'acute medicine for the elderly' department.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the acute medicine for the elderly department
Make sure you get address and postcode
